qids.subject: Theory of Computation
qids.prose: Which one of the following is FALSE? A. There is a unique minimal DFA for every regular language B. Every NFA can be converted to an equivalent PDA. C. Complement of every context-free language is recursive. D. Every nondeterministic PDA can be converted to an equivalent deterministic PDA.
